title: Weather and Tornadoes Remastered
description: An official remaster of the original 1.2.5 Weather and Tornadoes mod by Corosus!
body:
**I highly recommend using [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions) with this mod. It improves performance greatly. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) is also great.**

*For a more comprehensive overview of this mod, please see the CurseForge page: [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/weather-and-tornadoes-remastered)

# Weather & Tornadoes Remastered

Weather & Tornadoes Remastered is a semi-official remaster of the original Weather and Tornadoes (Weather1) mod by Corosus. Weather1 was discontinued after version 1.6.4, as it was replaced by his newer Weather2 mod, which features localized weather. This project has been endorsed by Corosus.

![Tornado and sirens](https://i.imgur.com/FTDJ3rg.png)
